title: [MIO]极简优化-Minimalism_Optimized
description:
A basic optimization
一个基本的优化整合包
body:
**[MIO] Minimalism Optimized** is a lightweight, performance-focused modpack crafted specifically for Minecraft players. Embracing minimalism as its core principle, it eliminates redundant mods and resources, retaining only essential optimization components and fundamental feature expansions—such as performance fixes, memory management, and visual enhancements. This ensures smooth gameplay even on low-end hardware. Through precise mod tuning and resource compression, it significantly boosts FPS stability, reducing lag and crashes. Whether exploring survival worlds or building in creative mode, players experience a clean, efficient gameplay that lets them immerse fully in the game itself, enjoying a high-definition, fluid block-based world. Ideal for players prioritizing performance and simplicity, it's the perfect choice for running Minecraft smoothly on less powerful systems.

……………………………………中文……………………………………

[MIO]极简优化-Minimalism Optimized是一款专为Minecraft玩家打造的轻量化性能向整合包。以“极简”为核心，剔除冗余模组与资源，仅保留核心优化组件与基础功能扩展，如性能修复、内存管理、画质增强等，确保低配设备也能流畅运行。通过精准的模组调校与资源压缩，显著提升帧率稳定性，减少卡顿与崩溃。无论是生存探索还是创造建造，都能以纯净高效的体验，让玩家专注于游戏本身，享受高清流畅的方块世界。适合追求性能与简洁的玩家，是低配电脑畅玩MC的理想选择。
